title: More Useless Additions
description: Add Things that may or be not necessary!
body:
### **Current version: 2.4** _(v2.3 for 1.21.8)_

The Mod Adds new items/blocks to the game. 6 variants of colourful calcite. Resin Ores and Raw Resin. Calcite Amethyst Ore, Apatite ores. A new Stone called "Tygiole" is added along with focial. Alienstone is here also. (Ender/Nether) Trapical Flowers! 

## Totorials:
### Loot boxes
Right Click with a **(Golden) Scrapped Key** or **Unuseal Key** to drop loot.
### Ender Trapical Flower
Right Click with a **Empty Bottle** and You _Need_ to have **30+ Xp Level** to optain one **Dragon Breath**
### Muddy Furnace
It use to "clone" sherds. you need to have a sherd you want to clone and some **Melted Clay Clumps**.
- (_Compatable with other mods that introduce new sherds!_)
>  If the sherd is **Common/Uncommon**, you'll need _3_ per shard's duplications.
> If it's **Rare/Epic** is _6_.
### AROUND 160 ITEMS (as of v2.1)
# Notes by the creator
### 2025/10/11
More Useless Additions 2.0 for Minecraft 1.21.4 & 1.21.8 comings soon!
### 2025/10/15
MUA's backport for 1.21.4 released as well with 1.21.8 port.(port in beta because I use Mcreator first 2025.3 snapshot so be aware of unwanted bugs!)
### 2025/11/24
Prepare for V3! Maybe the last 1.21.5 version of the mod! (V3 and above will be 1.21.8)
### 2026/05/18
Sorry! The hiatus is over now. V3.0 would properly be small as of right now. So I will change it to V2.1! Yep! This will be a drop for v3
### 2026/05/29
Greeny Treassures (V2.1) is out today!
*V2.2 will be out for 26.1.2 (Very minor changes)
### 2026/06/13
The mod have its first "compat" with another mod!
_Bronze_
### 2026/06/13
V3.0 is in dev.
